_meta.description: Axle Towing - Contact Activation Workflow (post-approval campaign enrollment)
instructions: 1. Go to GHL > Automation > Workflows > + Create Workflow
4. Add each step in order below
6. This workflow fires AFTER Elliott approves templates via the approval workflow
_meta.purpose: When templates are approved by Elliott (tag 'templates-approved' is added), this workflow moves the contact into the active campaign pipeline. It adds the 'campaign-active' tag and notifies the team that campaigns are ready to go live.
dependsOn: AI-7459 (Template Approval Workflow — must be created first)

workflow.name: Approval Activation — Start Campaign
workflow.description: Post-approval workflow. When Elliott approves templates (templates-approved tag), this moves the associated contacts into active campaigns. Pairs with the 'Template Approval — Elliott Review' workflow.

steps.description: Mark contact/batch as campaign-active — campaigns can now fire
Clear the templates-approved trigger tag (prevent re-triggering)

condition.description: Check if this is a nurture campaign batch

if_true.description: Move to Contacted stage — nurture sequences will pick up from here

if_false.description: Generic ready-for-enrollment tag for non-nurture campaigns

steps.subject: Axle Towing: Templates approved — campaigns activated
steps.body:
Elliott approved the template batch. Campaigns for {{contact.company_name}} are now set to ACTIVE. The following workflows can be switched from DRAFT to ACTIVE:

- PM Nurture 21-Day Sequence
- Referral Partner Sequences (6 types)
- Cold Outreach Sequences
- Re-engagement Campaigns

Confirm in GHL > Automation > Workflows that the relevant workflows are now ACTIVE.
steps.description: Notify Julian that templates are approved and campaigns can go live

steps.subject: Campaigns activated — here's what's running
steps.body:
Hi Elliott,

Your approved templates are now live. Here's a quick summary of what's active:

- Email outreach sequences: ACTIVE (sending Mon-Fri 8 AM - 5 PM)
- Referral partner intros: ACTIVE (sending Tue-Thu 9 AM - 11 AM)
- SMS messages: ON HOLD until A2P 10DLC registration confirms

All workflows have auto-stop rules — if anyone replies or asks to be removed, the sequence stops immediately.

You'll get monthly reports showing who's been contacted and response rates.

Questions? Call or text (619) 509-0699 anytime.

AI Acrobatics Team
steps.description: Confirmation email to Elliott that campaigns are live

verification.expectedOutcome: Contact gets campaign-active tag, team notified, Elliott confirmed
